latestReleaseNote.title: Aurora trust-fix and copy-boundary patch
latestReleaseNote.summary: Bundled the first Platinum fast-follow Aurora fixes: dual-fighter runs now continue correctly after a single-ship loss, challenge stages present as bonus stages without consuming normal stage numbering, end-of-run carry/capture visuals no longer leak under results, and startup/wait-mode shell copy now follows a clearer platform-versus-application ownership model.
